ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "user_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  "user_joined_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_followers_count" INTEGER /* The number of followers the user has */,
  "user_friends_count" INTEGER /* The number of friends the user has */,
  "user_tweets_count" INTEGER /* The number of tweets the user has posted */,
  "user_profile_image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile image */,
  "user_website" TEXT /* The user's website URL */,
  "user_is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* The number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* The number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* The language of the tweet */,
  "tweet_source" TEXT /* The source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter Web App, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "tweet_coordinates" TEXT /* The coordinates (latitude and longitude) where the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_place" TEXT /* The place (city, country) where the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_sensitive" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is marked as sensitive */,
  "tweet_withheld" TEXT /* Countries where the tweet is withheld */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_frequency" INTEGER /* The frequency of the hashtag in the dataset */,
  "hashtag_first_used" TEXT /* The date the hashtag was first used */,
  "hashtag_last_used" TEXT /* The date the hashtag was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the hashtag was used in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* The date the follower started following the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friend_since" TEXT /* The date the friend relationship started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "friend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_mentions" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the user was mentioned in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "mentioned_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL in the tweet */,
  "url_title" TEXT /* The title of the URL */,
  "url_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the URL */,
  "url_image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the image associated with the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "url")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* A numerical score representing the sentiment (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic extracted from the tweet */,
  "topic_frequency" INTEGER /* The frequency of the topic in the dataset */,
  "topic_first_mentioned" TEXT /* The date the topic was first mentioned */,
  "topic_last_mentioned" TEXT /* The date the topic was last mentioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "topic")
)
